value.found_quote: An isolation mode that runs Claude in a separate git worktree under `.claude/worktrees/`, enabled with the `-w` flag or `isolation: worktree` in subagent config. Changes stay on a separate branch in a separate directory, so parallel agents don't overwrite each other's files.
value.rationale: The page describes "Worktree isolation," a mode that runs Claude in a separate git worktree per session so parallel agents/sessions don't overwrite each other's files — matching the claim about worktrees providing separate git checkouts to prevent parallel sessions editing the same files. The page presents it as a current feature with no deprecation notice.
